name: Jello Pudding Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 package Jello chocolate pudding and pie filling -- not instant
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pudding, butter, and milk in a bowl.
2. Bring to a full boil over medium heat.
3. Boil gently for one minute while stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat and quickly stir in the sugar.
5. Add the nuts.
6. Pour into a greased 8x4-inch pan.
7. Cool completely.
8. Cut into squares.
Makes 1 lb. Any flavor of pudding will do.
